calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-03-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Petition for Letters of Administration is taken off calendar in open court.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-06-2022 Continued To Aug-03-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-08-2022 Continued To Jul-06-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John Farbstein, via Zoom, for Christopher Do, Petitioner.

Counsel reports on the status of this matter and related matters causing the delay. Counsel also advises of appearing today on behalf of Bruce Lubarsky, who could not appear today as he is currently dealing with health-related issues.

The matter is continued to Jul-06-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-16-2022 Continued To Jun-08-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John Farbstein, via ZOOM, for Christopher Do, Petitioner.

The court refers to a recent filing. Counsel advises that the filing should address most of the Examiner's notes and outlines his intent regarding the filing of this petition and offers additional advocacy with a request to continue to address remaining issues. The court advises counsel that if his client is not ready to be appointed, the court is inclined to take the petition off calendar and file the petition once he is. Counsel offers additional oral support for a request to continue.

After additional discussion, the Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to Jun-08-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: G. Bastain. Not reported.
